creator: patrick@mindstep.com
text:
Hi,

I am the maintainer of that port. The reason the build fails is that the
makefile does not reference some of the needed library for the final link.

Note that the port already includes a patch for the Makefile.

Attached are a patch the the port's patch (patch-aa) and the full patch
itself as it should look.

Thank you for commiting this quickly since other persons are likely to
encounter the problem.


Patrick.
--
MindStep Corporation
www.mindstep.com
